name: React + SQLite Harness
description: Constrains React + SQLite generation to a local React frontend, Node API, and workspace-bound SQLite database.

system: Generate a React frontend, a Node local API, and SQLite persistence for a local customer manager.
The frontend must call /api/* endpoints only and must never open or import SQLite directly.
fileSystemPolicy: Write React and Node API files inside generated/react.
Write schema, migrations, seed data, and app.sqlite only inside generated/data.
Do not read or write paths outside the active Sofvary workspace.
outputRules: Use parameterized SQL statements for every user-controlled value.
The API must bind to 127.0.0.1 only.
Keep Sofvary shell UI out of generated app source.
